title: OFSAA Training
description:
OFSAA training covers concepts from the Basic level to the advanced level.  Whether you are an individual or corporate client we can customize training course content as per your requirement.  And can arrange this OFSAA training as per your pace.

Oracle product which offer integrated banking analytical applications for Enterprise Performance Management (EPM) is known as OFSAA (Oracle Financial Services Analytical Applications). This OFSAA suite help in risk adjusted performance objectives. We will cover complete topics in details e.g. Banking fundamentals, OFSAA Installation, OFSAA and OFSAAI Architecture, FTP, ALM & PFT, etc.

1.       Oracle Financial Services Funds Transfer Pricing (FTP) module
